list.title: Moving House Tasks
list.intro: Shared checklist — tick a task and everyone sees it.
list.description: Moving House shared family task list

_comment: A task is a string, or an object {title, group?, shared?}. shared:true = each member completes their OWN copy (per-person), and the task is done only when every member listed in membersTiddler has done it. group nests a task under a preceding heading task in the same section.

sections.name: Between Exchange and Completion
tasks: Confirm and book your chosen removal company
Arrange contents insurance for your new home
Cancel milk, subscription boxes, and newspaper deliveries
If moving to a new area, register with a GP and dentist

sections.name: Change of Address Checklist
tasks: Notify insurance providers, including life insurance

sections.name: On Move Day
tasks: Do a final clean and walk-through of your old home
Lock up and leave your keys with your estate agent
Oversee removals company collection/delivery of your things

sections.name: After Moving In
tasks: Check utilities and alarms are working
Alert your surveyor to any unexpected faults in your new home
